title: strychnos croatii
intro: Strychnos croatii, also known as the Croatian tree toad or Strjepina, is a species of plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to Eastern Europe and the Balkans. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Strychnos croatii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating fever and other conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and extracts.
